extra.reason: Split into 4 issues: elegua-ak4 (parsing) → elegua-yup (adapter) → elegua-o2e (L4 sampling) → elegua-qbo (integration). See openspec/changes/add-sympy-adapter/
Added isinstance(s["value"], (int, float)) type guard in make_numeric_comparator. 3 new tests cover string, None, and mixed non-numeric values.
Applied normalizer to both sides of the normalized check (verdict.py:99). Added test_normalized_normalizes_both_sides.
Converted load_sxact_toml and WolframOracleAdapter from bare aliases to deprecating wrapper functions. Migrated all tests to use load_test_file and OracleAdapter. Added 2 deprecation tests.
Documented the RuntimeError trade-off in _OPERATIONAL_ERRORS with rationale for why it's acceptable.
